name: integration_acquisition_im_17_and_built_a_screens
method: [ACQUISITION] I'm 17 and built a screenshot beautifier for Windows - there's no CleanShot X for Windows, so I'm making one

phases.name: research
steps: scrape r/Windows + r/SideProject for CleanShot X gap mentions
scrape ShareX/Greenshot GitHub issues for most-requested missing features
pull AppSumo + Gumroad screenshot tool sales data

phases.name: build
steps: vibe-code Electron MVP: import screenshot, add padding/shadow/border-radius/background, export PNG
generate landing page targeting 'cleanshot x for windows alternative'

phases.name: distribute
steps: generate 3 tweets + 1 thread: 'There is no CleanShot X for Windows. I fixed that.'
